title: Tick Control Upper West Side | $125-$325 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional tick control services in Upper West Side, Manhattan. Protect your family & pets from Lyme disease. Licensed experts. Call for same-day service!
intro: The Upper West Side's proximity to Central Park and Riverside Park makes it a beautiful neighborhood, but also increases the risk of tick exposure for residents and their pets. Our specialized tick control services protect your property, family, and pets from dangerous tick-borne illnesses like Lyme disease. Best Pest Control NYC provides comprehensive tick treatments tailored to the unique needs of Upper West Side homes and outdoor spaces.
whyUs: With over 15 years serving Manhattan's Upper West Side, we understand the specific tick challenges posed by the neighborhood's tree-lined streets and park-adjacent properties. Our licensed technicians use EPA-approved treatments that are safe for children and pets while effectively eliminating ticks from your property.
localContext: Upper West Side residents who frequent Central Park, Riverside Park, or enjoy the neighborhood's many tree-lined brownstone blocks face elevated tick exposure, especially during spring and summer months. Our tick control program is designed specifically for the classic pre-war buildings, townhouses, and ground-floor apartments with garden access that define this historic Manhattan neighborhood.

faqs.question: Why is tick control important in the Upper West Side?
faqs.answer: The Upper West Side's proximity to Central Park and Riverside Park creates prime tick habitats. These areas have vegetation, wildlife, and shaded environments where ticks thrive. Regular tick control protects your family and pets from Lyme disease and other tick-borne illnesses, especially if you have ground-level access, a garden, or frequently visit nearby parks.

faqs.question: How much does tick control cost in Upper West Side?
faqs.answer: Our tick control services in the Upper West Side range from $125 to $325, depending on property size, severity of infestation, and treatment frequency. We offer one-time treatments as well as seasonal programs with multiple applications for ongoing protection during peak tick season from April through October.

faqs.question: When is tick season in Manhattan?
faqs.answer: Tick season in Manhattan typically runs from April through October, with peak activity in May, June, and July. However, ticks can be active whenever temperatures are above freezing. We recommend preventative treatments in early spring before tick populations peak, followed by maintenance treatments throughout the season.

faqs.question: Are your tick treatments safe for pets and children?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved tick control products that are safe for children and pets when applied by our licensed professionals. Treatments typically require a 2-4 hour drying period before the area is safe for re-entry. We provide detailed safety instructions and can schedule treatments at times convenient for your family's routine.
